name: Chongqing Lummy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Lummy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells pharmaceutical products in China. The company provides tumor, antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal, as well as liver disease auxiliary, endocrinology system, and Chinese patent drugs; digestive system, immune system, blood system, cardiovascular system, and nervous system drugs; acid-base balance and nutritional products; and base large infusion products, American ginseng systems, and active pharmaceutical ingredients. Chongqing Lummy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Chongqing, China.
